1: Give unto the LORD LORD , O ye mighty, give unto the LORD LORD glory and strength.
2: Worship the LORD LORD in the beauty of holiness.
3: The LORD LORD is is upon many waters.
4: The voice of the LORD LORD is is full of majesty.
5: Yea, the LORD LORD breaketh the cedars of Lebanon.
6: Lebanon and Sirion like a young unicorn.
7: The voice of the LORD LORD divideth the flames of fire.
8: The voice of the LORD LORD shaketh the wilderness; the LORD LORD shaketh the wilderness of Kadesh.
9: And in his temple doth every one speak of his his glory.
10: Yea, the LORD LORD sitteth King for ever.
11: The LORD LORD will bless his people with peace.
